headline: Oppenheimer Upgrades Blackstone to Outperform, Calling It the Premier Franchise at a Bargain Price
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) stock is up roughly 2% in early Monday trading after Oppenheimer upgraded shares to Outperform, calling the world’s largest alternative asset manager a “premier franchise at a very attractive valuation.” Shares are trading around $117 as of this morning’s session. The upgrade arrives after a bruising stretch for Blackstone stock. Shares are down ... Oppenheimer Upgrades Blackstone to Outperform, Calling It the Premier Franchise at a Bargain Price

headline: Vinson & Elkins Hires Ed Moberly to Expand London Transactions Practice
summary: By Karen Roman Vinson & Elkins said Ed Moberly is the firm’s latest tax partner in London, addressing the firm’s rising demand for comprehensive tax support in complex cross‑border deals. Mr. Moberly is a transactions-focused tax lawyer with experience in private equity, M&A, joint ventures, fund formations, restructurings, and selected contentious tax matters and investigations, […] The post Vinson & Elkins Hires Ed Moberly to Expand London Transactions Practice appeared first on CorpGov.
